title: Youth Justice Board Annual Report and Accounts, 2024 to 2025
body: "The Youth Justice Board for England and Wales (YJB) has oversight of the entire youth justice system and collects and analyses a range of data and intelligence, including:     the number of children entering the criminal justice system for the first time    the number of children reoffending    the use of custody     This report also includes an update on the role of the organisation, the work we have delivered and our annual accounts. "
